content.text:
# Tokyo Station

This is an image of **Tokyo Station** (東京駅), located in **Tokyo, Japan**.

The building is one of Japan's most iconic railway stations, featuring distinctive red brick architecture with a dark mansard roof and central dome. The station was originally completed in 1914 and has been carefully preserved and restored. The image shows the front plaza (Marunouchi side) with its modern paved courtyard, which provides a striking contrast between the historic Edwardian architecture of the station building and the contemporary skyscrapers visible in the background.
